comment.body:
Thanks for replying Terrence ! 

I wasn’t referring anything to the market today. 

I read and learn about  charm , vanna, delta from Alma’s chat and what confused me is how to utilize them since market maker will have position in every strikes so all these deltas and effects from their derivative will be mixed up , if we don’t know where they have the most position we can’t get any information about how they hedge.  
The JPM Collar today in the post tells us where MM have their most position and we can then use that specific strike to analyze the effects that charm, vanna and gamma will played on it. 

Not sure if my understanding of how to utilize the Greeks is correct

comment.body:
Another food for thought. I saw cem retweet this post by Wayne Whaley. He charts the s&p performance for the last 40 years for the pre and post OPEX weeks of the quarterly OPEX. 

What I notice there is how for March quarterly, the pre OPEX week (the mon-Fri of the OPEX week) are up 26 times and down 14 times. Whereas the post OPEX week is down 25 times and up 15 times. 

If these stats hint at something, Next week could be overall an up week and the week after a down week.
